judge_result.short_rationale: Includes the core immediate washing step, but omits required sterile dressings and the required consult-a-skin-specialist escalation for any exposure. It also adds several source-ungrounded details and weakens escalation by making medical attention conditional.

  "short_rationale": "Includes the core immediate washing step, but omits required sterile dressings and the required consult-a-skin-specialist escalation for any exposure. It also adds several source-ungrounded details and weakens escalation by making medical attention conditional."
